title: Opening for Production Engineer at Su-Kam Power Systems

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Su-Kam Power Systems
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Production Engineer looking for your next big career move? Su-Kam Power Systems in Pune offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Su-Kam Power Systems:
Su-Kam Power Systems is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Su-Kam Power Systems!
